title: Hardcore Heroes
description: An Modpack that‘s made for an survival or PvP Server. For Singleplayer and Multiplayer.
body:
This Modpack is made to make the game more fun and that you have more to do in youre World.

Most important Mods:

•Ice and Fire: Adds new dungeons and Creatures like Dragons and Ghosts.

•Ad Astra: Adds new ores and 5 planets wich you can travel to with a rocket.

•Ad Extendra: adds 4 new planets, 9 new dwarf planets and 1 new exoplanet.

•Mekanism: Adds many new things like a Jetpack and sepecial armor.

•Battle Towers: Adds Battle Towers with much loot and a Tower Golem wich is defending the tower.

•Dungeons and Taverns: Adds many new Dungeons, Structures and 12 new enchantments.

•Dungeons Plus: Adds new Dungeons.

•Pure Ores: Adds new ores.

•Neterrocks: Adds new Nether ores.

•SimpleOres2: Adds new Ores.

•Fusion: Adds the Fusion Furnace wich can create new ores.

•SecurityCraft: Adds many new and special tools, items and block to protect your Base.

There are a few other mods wich add a few small dungeons and a few more items and other stuff. There are even a few optimization Mods to make the game run smother and a few Resource Packs that the game looks better.
